owner_priority: Reach the first functional owner-testable Strategic Nexus v0 as quickly as safely possible; defer polish until the real-game validation loop exists. New approved direction: prove the smallest legal reactive policy-pack slice so a loaded mod can react in-session through precompiled branches.
selection_rule: Take owner-approved suggestion chunks first, then the first ready unblocked roadmap chunk in order, unless current code already satisfies it; reactive policy-pack chunks supersede polish/convenience chunks when generated-overlay gameplay effect is the blocker; then verify and record evidence.
exhaustion_rule: If all queued chunks are completed while the roadmap still contains unblocked IN_PROGRESS or NOT_STARTED work, refresh this queue from the roadmap or implement the next obvious bounded roadmap chunk; do not end with no_safe_task.
chunk_finish_rule: Targeted validation, fail-safe behavior for unsafe inputs where applicable, one coherent commit before the next implementation chunk.
current_source: Stable owner_test_playbook_path now ships across SNC snapshot/tray/loop surfaces; next bounded work is fail-closed tray smoke coverage for that contract

chunks.title: Add tray smoke owner-test playbook field coverage
chunks.goal: Extend the SNC tray smoke contract so the new top-level owner_test_playbook_path field is explicitly verified without scraping summary text.
acceptance: tools/smoke_snc_tray.ps1 explicitly checks the top-level owner_test_playbook_path field in snc_tray_status.json.
The smoke contract stays fail-closed for non-ready states by expecting an empty owner-test playbook path instead of reconstructing readiness from summary text.
Smoke output surfaces the field value so future verification can read the stable contract directly.

chunks.title: Refresh progress after tray playbook smoke
chunks.roadmap_anchor: Task Board And Owner Report Log
chunks.goal: Keep roadmap notes, sprint queue, and today's owner-facing daily summary aligned after tray smoke coverage for owner_test_playbook_path lands.
acceptance: Roadmap notes mention the shipped stable tray smoke coverage for owner_test_playbook_path.
The sprint queue advances to the next missing bounded roadmap slice instead of leaving the tray-smoke coverage chunk as the head item.
The daily freework report for 2026-06-06 is replaced, not duplicated.
